en: "On the first day of the seventh month you shall have a holy convocation. You shall not do any ordinary work. It is a day for you to blow the trumpets,
zh: “‘七月第一日，你們要有聖會；甚麼勞碌的工都不可作。這是你們吹角的日子。

en: and you shall offer a burnt offering, for a pleasing aroma to the LORD: one bull from the herd, one ram, seven male lambs a year old without blemish;
zh: 你們要把燔祭作馨香的祭獻給耶和華，就是一頭公牛犢、一隻公綿羊、七隻一歲沒有殘疾的公羊羔。

en: also their grain offering of fine flour mixed with oil, three tenths of an ephah for the bull, two tenths for the ram,
zh: 同獻的素祭，是用油調和的細麵，為每頭公牛要獻上三公斤；為每隻公綿羊要獻上兩公斤；

en: and one tenth for each of the seven lambs;
zh: 為那七隻公羊羔，每隻要獻一公斤；

en: with one male goat for a sin offering, to make atonement for you;
zh: 還要獻一隻公山羊作贖罪祭，為你們贖罪；

en: besides the burnt offering of the new moon, and its grain offering, and the regular burnt offering and its grain offering, and their drink offering, according to the rule for them, for a pleasing aroma, a food offering to the LORD.
zh: 在月初的燔祭和同獻的素祭、常獻的燔祭和同獻的素祭，以及照例同獻的奠祭以外，還要獻上這些給耶和華作馨香的火祭。

en: "On the tenth day of this seventh month you shall have a holy convocation and afflict yourselves. You shall do no work,
zh: “‘在七月十日，你們要有聖會，刻苦己心，甚麼都不可作，

en: but you shall offer a burnt offering to the LORD, a pleasing aroma: one bull from the herd, one ram, seven male lambs a year old: see that they are without blemish.
zh: 只要把燔祭作馨香的祭獻給耶和華，就是一頭公牛犢、一隻公綿羊、七隻一歲沒有殘疾的公羊羔。

en: And their grain offering shall be of fine flour mixed with oil, three tenths of an ephah for the bull, two tenths for the one ram,
zh: 同獻的素祭，是用油調和的細麵，為每頭公牛要獻三公斤；為每隻公綿羊要獻兩公斤。

en: a tenth for each of the seven lambs:
zh: 為那七隻公羊羔，每隻要獻一公斤；

en: also one male goat for a sin offering, besides the sin offering of atonement, and the regular burnt offering and its grain offering, and their drink offerings.
zh: 在為贖罪的贖罪祭、常獻的燔祭和同獻的素祭，以及同獻的奠祭以外，還要獻一隻公山羊作贖罪祭。

en: "On the fifteenth day of the seventh month you shall have a holy convocation. You shall not do any ordinary work, and you shall keep a feast to the LORD seven days.
zh: “‘七月十五日，你們要有聖會；甚麼勞碌的工都不可作，要向耶和華守節七天；

en: And you shall offer a burnt offering, a food offering, with a pleasing aroma to the LORD, thirteen bulls from the herd, two rams, fourteen male lambs a year old; they shall be without blemish;
zh: 你們要給耶和華獻燔祭，作馨香的火祭，就是十三頭公牛犢、兩隻公綿羊、十四隻一歲沒有殘疾的公羊羔。

en: and their grain offering of fine flour mixed with oil, three tenths of an ephah for each of the thirteen bulls, two tenths for each of the two rams,
zh: 同獻的素祭，是用油調和的細麵，為那十三頭公牛，每隻要獻三公斤；為那兩隻公綿羊，每隻要獻兩公斤；

en: and a tenth for each of the fourteen lambs;
zh: 為那十四隻公羊羔，每隻要獻一公斤；

en: also one male goat for a sin offering, besides the regular burnt offering, its grain offering and its drink offering.
zh: 在常獻的燔祭和同獻的素祭，以及同獻的奠祭以外，還要獻一隻公山羊作贖罪祭。

en: "On the second day twelve bulls from the herd, two rams, fourteen male lambs a year old without blemish,
zh: “‘第二日，要獻公牛犢十二頭、公綿羊兩隻、一歲沒有殘疾的公羊羔十四隻，

en: with the grain offering and the drink offerings for the bulls, for the rams, and for the lambs, in the prescribed quantities;
zh: 並且為公牛、公綿羊和公羊羔，按著數目，照著規例，獻上同獻的素祭和同獻的奠祭。

en: also one male goat for a sin offering, besides the regular burnt offering and its grain offering, and their drink offerings.
zh: 在常獻的燔祭和同獻的素祭，以及同獻的奠祭以外，還要獻一隻公山羊作贖罪祭。

en: "On the third day eleven bulls, two rams, fourteen male lambs a year old without blemish,
zh: “‘第三日，要獻公牛十一頭、公綿羊兩隻、一歲沒有殘疾的公羊羔十四隻；

en: with the grain offering and the drink offerings for the bulls, for the rams, and for the lambs, in the prescribed quantities;
zh: 並且為公牛、公綿羊和公羊羔，按著數目，照著規例，獻上同獻的素祭和同獻的奠祭；

en: also one male goat for a sin offering, besides the regular burnt offering and its grain offering and its drink offering.
zh: 在常獻的燔祭和同獻的素祭，以及同獻的奠祭以外，還要獻一隻公山羊作贖罪祭。

en: "On the fourth day ten bulls, two rams, fourteen male lambs a year old without blemish,
zh: “‘第四日，要獻公牛十頭、公綿羊兩隻、一歲沒有殘疾的公羊羔十四隻；

en: with the grain offering and the drink offerings for the bulls, for the rams, and for the lambs, in the prescribed quantities;
zh: 並且為公牛、公綿羊和公羊羔，按著數目，照著規例，獻上同獻的素祭和同獻的奠祭；

en: also one male goat for a sin offering, besides the regular burnt offering, its grain offering and its drink offering.
zh: 在常獻的燔祭和同獻的素祭，以及同獻的奠祭以外，還要獻一隻公山羊作贖罪祭。

en: "On the fifth day nine bulls, two rams, fourteen male lambs a year old without blemish,
zh: “‘第五日，要獻公牛九頭、公綿羊兩隻、一歲沒有殘疾的公羊羔十四隻；

en: with the grain offering and the drink offerings for the bulls, for the rams, and for the lambs, in the prescribed quantities;
zh: 並且為公牛、公綿羊和公羊羔，按著數目，照著規例，獻上同獻的素祭和同獻的奠祭；

en: also one male goat for a sin offering; besides the regular burnt offering and its grain offering and its drink offering.
zh: 在常獻的燔祭和同獻的素祭，以及同獻的奠祭以外，還要獻上一隻公山羊作贖罪祭。

en: "On the sixth day eight bulls, two rams, fourteen male lambs a year old without blemish,
zh: “‘第六日，要獻公牛八頭、公綿羊兩隻、一歲沒有殘疾的公羊羔十四隻；

en: with the grain offering and the drink offerings for the bulls, for the rams, and for the lambs, in the prescribed quantities;
zh: 並且為公牛、公綿羊和公羊羔，按著數目，照著規例，獻上同獻的素祭和同獻的奠祭；

en: also one male goat for a sin offering; besides the regular burnt offering, its grain offering, and its drink offerings.
zh: 在常獻的燔祭和同獻的素祭，以及同獻的奠祭以外，還要獻上一隻公山羊作贖罪祭。

en: "On the seventh day seven bulls, two rams, fourteen male lambs a year old without blemish,
zh: “‘第七日，要獻公牛七頭、公綿羊兩隻、一歲沒有殘疾的公羊羔十四隻；

en: with the grain offering and the drink offerings for the bulls, for the rams, and for the lambs, in the prescribed quantities;
zh: 並且為公牛、公綿羊和公羊羔，按著數目，照著規例，獻上同獻的素祭和同獻的奠祭；

en: also one male goat for a sin offering; besides the regular burnt offering, its grain offering, and its drink offering.
zh: 在常獻的燔祭和同獻的素祭，以及同獻的奠祭以外，還要獻上一隻公山羊作贖罪祭。

en: "On the eighth day you shall have a solemn assembly. You shall not do any ordinary work,
zh: “‘第八日，你們要有盛會；甚麼勞碌的工都不可作，

en: but you shall offer a burnt offering, a food offering, with a pleasing aroma to the LORD: one bull, one ram, seven male lambs a year old without blemish,
zh: 只要給耶和華獻燔祭，作馨香的火祭，就是公牛一頭、公綿羊一隻、一歲沒有殘疾的公羊羔七隻；

en: and the grain offering and the drink offerings for the bull, for the ram, and for the lambs, in the prescribed quantities;
zh: 並且為公牛、公綿羊和公羊羔，按著數目，照著規例，獻上同獻的素祭和同獻的奠祭；

en: also one male goat for a sin offering; besides the regular burnt offering and its grain offering and its drink offering.
zh: 在常獻的燔祭和同獻的素祭，以及同獻的奠祭以外，還要獻一隻公山羊作贖罪祭。

en: "These you shall offer to the LORD at your appointed feasts, in addition to your vow offerings and your freewill offerings, for your burnt offerings, and for your grain offerings, and for your drink offerings, and for your peace offerings."
zh: “‘在那些為還願或是甘心所獻，作你們的燔祭、素祭、奠祭，或是平安祭的以外，這些是在你們規定的時期內，要獻給耶和華的祭物。’”

en: So Moses told the people of Israel everything just as the LORD had commanded Moses.
zh: 於是，摩西照著耶和華吩咐他的一切話，對以色列人說了。
